# jellyfin_libraries (Data Source)

Lists all Jellyfin media libraries (virtual folders) on the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_libraries" "all" {}

output "library_names" {
  value = [for l in data.jellyfin_libraries.all.libraries : l.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `libraries` (Attributes List) The list of libraries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--libraries))

<a id="nestedatt--libraries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `libraries`

Read-Only:

- `collection_type` (String) The collection type.
- `item_id` (String) The internal item ID assigned by Jellyfin.
- `name` (String) The library name.
